title: Secure, Performant, and Maintainable Python Delivery · Behavior Case: Python Release Packaging
summary: Deliver a trustworthy local automation product for a community program with operator and learner documentation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python release packaging increment in a production-shaped local automation capstone. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Produce a clean environment install, command entry point, version, dependency record, tests, and reproducible release checklist.
Measure time and memory on representative workloads before optimizing algorithms, data structures, or I/O.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
